description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!
The world's best AI personal assistant for email. Open source app to help you reach inbox zero fast.
【Zotero AI 管家】调用大模型，自动精读论文库里的论文，总结为Zotero笔记。支持主流大模型平台！您只需像往常一样把文献丢进 Zotero， 管家会自动帮您精读论文，将文章揉碎了总结为笔记，让您“十分钟完全了解”这篇论文！
Markdown memory system for you and your AI agent
A complete Getting Things Done (GTD) productivity system for desktop and mobile.
Supercharge Claude Code with 11 AI agents, 36 commands & 15 skills — the claude-code plugin framework inspired by oh-my-zsh. 6-layer security hooks included. 5-min install.
A structured 3-agent AI dev team — Architect, Builder, Reviewer. Built from production use. Token-optimized. Works with Claude Code, VS Code, Cursor, and any AI that supports context files.

Entroly-Daemon: Self-Evolving Daemon. Compress 2M-token repos into a razor-sharp Principal Engineer's context. 85–99% fewer tokens, 100% accuracy retention (verified by live API benchmarks). Built for Cursor, Claude Code, Opus, Codex, GPT & Custom Providers.
A simple CLI tool that automates the process of backporting commits on a GitHub repo
Monitor all your Claude AI usage limits in real-time from your macOS menu bar - supports 5-hour, 7-day, extra usage, 7-day Opus and 7-day Sonnet quotas.

💥 Personal knowledge management application. One binary HTTP server. works in any Markdown directory. autolinks pages, hashtags, auto preview images link, screenshare, screenshot, camera recording and audio recording embedded in the note. and fast search through the KB
Input0 — A macOS voice input tool: hold a hotkey to record, release to transcribe locally via STT, refine with LLM, and auto-paste into the active text field.
Agentic coding TypeScript boilerplate for Claude Code — sub-agent workflows with built-in quality checks and context engineering.
